title: Classic Durability overlay
description: A resourcepack which adds custom models for both netherite and diamond armor as well as the items to show their durability
body:
# This is the durability overlay for the PVP Texture Pack
**Show the durability of :**

 • armor :
 
   • stage 1 -> 10-20%
   
   • stage 2 -> 20-30%
   
   • stage 3 -> 30-40%
   
   • stage 4 -> 40-50%
   
   • stage 5 -> 50-60%
   
   • stage 6 -> 60-70%
   
   • stage 7 -> 70-80%
   
   • stage 8 -> 80-90%
   
   • stage 9 -> 90-100%
